About accounting firms in London

London is home to 1205 accounting firms on the TaxReady directory with specialisms spanning Professional Services, Construction, and Real Estate. Across the city, firms hold an average Google rating of 4.8★ over 65,224 reviews — a genuine signal of local reputation rather than marketing spend.

The most-reviewed firms in London include Taxfix UK (TaxScouts), M.A.C.T Limited, and Personal Debt Solutions (PDS) — all listed above with full profiles, specialisms, and direct enquiry.

Not sure who to pick? Our AI reviews all 1205 firms against your situation (business type, specialism, fee range, city) and returns your top 3 matches in 60 seconds. Get AI-matched for London →

How ranking works

Google reviews + profile strength.

Every firm gets a base score from their Google reviews (volume and rating combined, so small-sample 5-star firms don't leapfrog established ones). On top of that, we add a transparent profile-strength boost — capped at +30% — for firms actively keeping their TaxReady profile current.

Base scorelog(reviews) × rating
Claimed profile+15%
Specialisms listed+6%
Firm bio written+4%
Accreditations listed+3%
Fee range shown+2%
Is this your firm? Move up the list →

Takes about a minute. Free, forever. Claim your profile and fill in your specialisms, bio, fees and accreditations — each one lifts your score.
